title: goniophlebium benguetense
intro: Goniophlebium benguetense, also known as the Benguet fern, is a species of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Goniophlebium benguetense include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in traditional medicine to create remedies for various health conditions.
